title: Device Decision Success Payload DTO
description: Safe human-facing summary returned after the portal records an approved or denied device authorization decision. SECURITY INVARIANT: this payload MUST NEVER contain the API key; the key is delivered exclusively through the CLI's /api/v1/auth/device/token poll.

user_code.description: The normalized user_code whose pending authorization was decided.

decision.description: Decision recorded for the device authorization.

client.description: Optional safe client/device display summary for the human. Values are public or server-masked; never include secrets.

masked_client_id.description: Public or server-masked client identifier shown for confirmation.

device_hint.description: Optional server-sanitized device or CLI hint shown for human disambiguation.

project.description: Project scope that the CLI key will be limited to after approval.

id.description: Project id for the approved default project scope.
